title: World Pilot: Steering Vision-Language-Action Models with World-Action Priors
summary: World Pilot is a framework that enhances Vision-Language-Action models through two complementary pathways derived from a World-Action Model. One pathway conditions perception on anticipated scene evolution; the other supplies trajectory guidance to the action generator. The system achieves a state-of-the-art total success rate of 84.7% on LIBERO-Plus benchmarks and demonstrates superior real-robot performance across manipulation tasks.
